entries.abstract: An integrated experiment that joins inorganic synthesis, photochemistry and photography: students prepare tris(oxalato)ferrate(III), coat paper with it, and produce cyanotype (blueprint) images, since photoreduced Fe(II) reacts with ferricyanide to form Prussian blue; connects coordination chemistry, redox photochemistry and the history of photography. (Parent article of SI files ed500809n_si_*.)

entries.abstract: A laboratory activity for first-year undergraduates that bridges chemistry and creativity through cyanotype photography: students make cyanotype prints, explore chemical toning of the Prussian blue image, and test the UV-shielding properties of the prints, learning redox photochemistry, coordination chemistry and light–matter interactions. Published online as an ACS ASAP article; volume/issue/pages not yet assigned. (Parent article of SI file ed5c01101_si_002.)

entries.journal: Proceedings of the Royal Society of London A: Mathematical and Physical Sciences
entries.abstract: A detailed study of the photolysis of acidified potassium ferrioxalate solutions recommended for chemical actinometry. Quantum efficiencies were determined at 12 wavelengths between 254 and 578 nm, and the effects of temperature, light intensity and photolyte composition investigated; calibrated against uranyl oxalate and a thermopile. Ferrioxalate is recommended as a general-purpose actinometer for its high sensitivity (~1000x uranyl oxalate), precision, long wavelength range, stability and simplicity of use; full working details are provided.

entries.title: A new sensitive chemical actinometer. I. Some trials with potassium ferrioxalate
questions: 草酸铁(Ⅲ)酸钾光解为什么可以用作化学光量计(actinometer)？
Parker 1953年的实验是如何用光度法测定光解生成的Fe(II)的？
entries.journal: Proceedings of the Royal Society of London A: Mathematical and Physical Sciences
entries.abstract: The first of the classic two-part actinometry series: preliminary trials showing that photolysis of acidified potassium ferrioxalate, with colorimetric determination of the Fe(II) formed, provides a sensitive, precise liquid-phase chemical actinometer for the near-UV and visible region; lays the groundwork for the Hatchard–Parker standard actinometer (Part II, 1956).

entries.title: Chemical actinometry (IUPAC Technical Report)
entries.authors: H. J. Kuhn, S. E. Braslavsky, R. Schmidt
questions: IUPAC推荐的草酸铁光量计标准操作流程和量子产率数据是什么？
如何用化学光量计测定光源的光子通量？
entries.abstract: IUPAC技术报告，系统给出化学光量计(以草酸铁(Ⅲ)酸钾ferrioxalate光量计为代表)的推荐操作步骤、不同波长下的量子产率数据表、光通量测定与计算方法，并对多种化学光量体系进行评述，是光化学定量测量的权威参考。

entries.title: Practical Chemical Actinometry—A Review
entries.authors: J. Rabani, H. Mamane, I. Pousty, J. R. Bolton
questions: 目前常用的化学光量计有哪些，各自适用的波长范围如何？
草酸铁光量计相比碘化物-碘酸根光量计有何优缺点？
entries.abstract: Actinometers are physical or chemical systems that can be employed to determine photon fluxes. Chemical actinometers are photochemical systems with known quantum yields that enable calculating photon fluxes from measurable reactant/product changes. This review explores in detail several practical chemical actinometers (ferrioxalate, iodide-iodate, uranyl oxalate, nitrate, uridine, hydrogen peroxide, and several actinometers for the vacuum UV), their quantum yields, practical procedures and limitations.

entries.title: The ferrioxalate and iodide-iodate actinometers in the UV region
questions: 在深紫外区草酸铁光量计的量子产率与可见区有何不同？
使用草酸铁光量计测量UV光源时应注意哪些系统误差？
entries.journal: Journal of Photochemistry and Photobiology A: Chemistry
entries.abstract: The ferrioxalate and iodide-iodate actinometers were re-examined in the UV region (down to 205 nm); wavelength-dependent quantum yields were redetermined and compared with literature values, and recommendations are given for accurate actinometric measurements in the deep-UV, where ferrioxalate quantum yields differ from the commonly used near-UV/visible values.

entries.title: Errors in ferrioxalate actinometry
questions: 草酸铁光量计的系统误差主要来自哪些因素？
Kirk和Namasivayam建议如何修正量子产率数据？
entries.abstract: 指出草酸铁光量测定中的误差来源：实验表明沿用当时推荐的量子产率值会给光通量测定带来可观的系统误差(可达约7%)，文中给出修正的波长依赖量子产率并讨论减少误差的实验要点。

entries.title: Determination of the quantum yield of the ferrioxalate actinometer with electrically calibrated radiometers
entries.authors: J. N. Demas, W. D. Bowman, E. F. Zalewski, R. A. Velapoldi
questions: 如何用电定标辐射计对草酸铁光量计进行绝对标定？
Demas等人的标定结果与Hatchard-Parker经典值相差多少？
entries.abstract: The quantum yield of the ferrioxalate actinometer was measured against electrically calibrated radiometers at several wavelengths; results largely confirm the Hatchard–Parker values (agreement within a few percent) while providing an absolute, detector-based recalibration of this standard actinometer.

entries.title: Determination of the quantum yields of the potassium ferrioxalate and potassium iodide-iodate actinometers and a method for the calibration of radiometer detectors
entries.authors: J. R. Bolton, M. I. Stefan, P.-S. Shaw, K. R. Lykke
questions: 2011年重新标定的草酸铁光量计量子产率是多少？
如何用化学光量计校准辐射计探测器？
entries.journal: Journal of Photochemistry and Photobiology A: Chemistry
entries.abstract: 重新测定了草酸铁钾与碘化钾-碘酸钾两种光量计在多个波长下的量子产率，并提出一种用光量计反标辐射计探测器的方法，为UV消毒等光化学工程应用提供更可靠的光通量计量基准。

entries.title: Simplification of the potassium ferrioxalate actinometer through carbon dioxide monitoring
questions: 如何用CO2释放量替代Fe(II)显色分析来简化草酸铁光量计？
这种简化方法对大学光化学实验教学有什么好处？
entries.abstract: 提出一种简化草酸铁光量计的新策略：以在线监测光解过程中释放的CO2代替传统的Fe(II)-邻菲啰啉显色光度分析，使光通量测定更快捷、可连续读数，适用于光化学教学与研究中的常规光量测定。

entries.title: Practical ferrioxalate actinometry for the determination of photon fluxes in production-oriented photoflow reactors
entries.authors: B. Vandekerckhove, T. Noel, et al.
questions: 在连续流光化学反应器中如何测定实际光子通量？
强光条件下如何防止草酸铁光量计过快饱和？
entries.abstract: 面向生产型光流反应器，给出实用的草酸铁光量测定方案（包括'调暗光源'、分段测量和时间分辨三种方法），解决强光源下光量计快速饱和、难以测准光子通量的问题，为光化学工艺放大提供计量依据。

entries.title: New insight into photochemistry of ferrioxalate
entries.authors: I. P. Pozdnyakov, O. V. Kel, V. F. Plyusnin, V. P. Grivin, N. M. Bazhin
questions: 草酸铁光解的初级光化学过程包含哪些瞬态物种？
闪光光解实验如何解释草酸铁量子产率的波长依赖性？
entries.journal: The Journal of Physical Chemistry A
entries.abstract: The photochemistry of ferrioxalate was studied by nanosecond laser flash photolysis. The primary photochemical process involves ligand-to-metal charge transfer producing the oxalate radical complex, which decomposes to Fe(II) and CO2/CO2•-; the observed intermediate kinetics clarify the origin of the wavelength-dependent quantum yield of the ferrioxalate actinometer.

entries.title: A chronological review of photochemical reactions of ferrioxalate at the molecular level: New insights into an old story
entries.authors: X. Li, M. Hou, Y. Fu, L. Wang, Y. Wang, D. Lin, Q. Li, D. Hu, Z. Wang
questions: 分子水平上草酸铁光解机理研究经历了哪些阶段？
超快光谱技术给草酸铁光化学带来了哪些新认识？
entries.abstract: 按时间脉络综述分子水平上草酸铁(ferrioxalate)光化学反应研究的进展：从经典的光还原机理、初级自由基过程到飞秒光谱等新技术带来的新认识，梳理这一'老体系'在光化学、光量测定与环境光催化中的持续价值。

entries.title: Synthesis, crystal structure and characterization of chiral, three-dimensional anhydrous potassium tris(oxalato)ferrate(III)
entries.authors: A. Saritha, B. Raju, M. Ramachary, P. Raghavaiah, K. A. Hussain
questions: 无水K3[Fe(C2O4)3]与三水合物在晶体结构上有何差异？
三草酸合铁(Ⅲ)酸盐为何能形成手性三维网络？
entries.abstract: 合成了无水的三草酸合铁(Ⅲ)酸钾，并由X射线单晶衍射确定其结构：形成手性三维网络结构；结合红外、热分析与磁性等手段进行表征，与常见的三水合物K3[Fe(C2O4)3]·3H2O形成对照。

entries.title: Determination of molecular formula of potassium tris(oxalato)ferrate(III) trihydrate
questions: 如何由组成分析数据推导三草酸合铁(Ⅲ)酸钾的分子式？
测定该配合物中结晶水含量可采用哪些实验方法？
entries.abstract: 面向学生的教学短文，演示如何通过滴定(测定草酸根与铁含量)与热重/灼烧(测定结晶水)等经典分析手段，由实验数据推导出K3[Fe(C2O4)3]·3H2O的分子式，是化学计量学与配合物组成分析的教学范例。

entries.title: Natural iron oxalates and their analogous synthetic counterparts: A review
questions: 自然界中存在哪些铁草酸盐矿物，其组成与结构如何？
天然铁草酸盐与合成铁-草酸配合物有何对应关系？
entries.abstract: 综述天然铁草酸盐矿物(如草酸铁矿humboldtine等)的组成、结构、生成条件与性质，并与人工合成的铁-草酸盐体系(包括三草酸合铁(Ⅲ)酸盐等)对比，讨论地球化学与配位化学的关联。

entries.title: Ultrafast photoelectron spectroscopy of photoexcited aqueous ferrioxalate
questions: 超快光电子能谱能揭示草酸铁激发态的哪些动力学信息？
草酸铁初级光还原过程发生在什么时间尺度？
entries.abstract: 用液相超快光电子能谱研究水溶液中光激发的草酸铁(ferrioxalate)：在飞秒-皮秒时间尺度上直接观测配体-金属电荷转移激发态的演化与初级光还原过程，为这一经典光量计体系的超快机理提供实验证据。
